name: libfile-fcntllock-perl
title: libfile-fcntllock-perl
summary: Perl module for file locking with fcntl(2)
description:
Perl module for file locking with fcntl(2)
File::FcntlLock is a Perl module to do file locking in an object oriented
fashion using the fcntl(2) system call. This allows locks on parts of a file
as well as on the whole file and overcomes some known problems with flock(2),
on which Perl's flock() function is based.
.
Furthermore due to its design it supports reliable locking over NFS.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libfile-fcntllock-perl because Perl module for file locking with fcntl(2).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libfile-fcntllock-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libfile-fcntllock-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libfile-fcntllock-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
